title: Mini Games Relax Collection
description: Mini Games: Relax Collection is a stress-relieving game. The game contains five mini-games: Clean Makeup, Fix Teeth, Shave, Left/Right 1 and 2. The game requires no skill and is easy to play for all ages! Free your brain from the stress and anxiety of tedious work and let you experience endless peace and happiness, sweeping away all your worries! Whats the hesitation? https://www.puzzlegame.com/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
